subcodes.first_line: O dear and heavenly daughter! Thy letter hath arrived. Truly, thy heartfelt love is very deep, sincere, and connected. Therefore, thy love is greatly appreciated
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز ملکوتی نامه ات رسید فی الحقیقه محبت قلبی تو بسیار عمیق است و حقیقی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
